insert.foreach:
INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0403-01#Sql001 */ INTO CORDYS.FUND_RESERVE_SETTING ( BUTEN_CODE , ACCOUNT_NUMBER , FUND_CD_KAISU , FUND_CD_GOU , AZUKARI_KBN , MODIFY_KBN , PAYMENT_METHOD , NISA_BARELY_BUYING_KBN , NISA_EXCESS_BUYING_KBN , SETTING_AMOUNT , COURSE_KBN , SETTING_RESERVE_DD , SETTING_RESERVE_BIMONTHLY , SETTING_RESERVE_WEEKLY , SETTING_RESERVE_MULTIDAY , ONE_MONTH_SUM_AMOUNT , SETTING_BONUS_FLAG , PAYMENT_BONUS , RESERVE_MM_B1 , RESERVE_DD_B1 , RESERVE_MM_B2 , RESERVE_DD_B2 , PLAN_DATE , PLAN_DATE_BONUS1 , PLAN_DATE_BONUS2 , NEXT_RESERVE_DATE , KANYU_KBN , UKETUKE_HOUHOU , CHECK_COMP_WRN_ALERT , RECEPTION_ROUTE_KBN , OPERATOR_ID , BROKER_CODE , INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD , DELETE_KBN , CREATE_TIME , CREATE_USER , UPDATE_TIME , UPDATE_USER ) VALUES ( #{item.butenCode} , #{item.accountNumber} , #{item.fundCdKaisu} , #{item.fundCdGou} , #{item.azukariKbn} , '2' , '1' , #{item.nisaBarelyBuyingKbn} , #{item.nisaExcessBuyingKbn} , TO_NUMBER(#{item.settingAmount}) , #{item.courseKbn} , #{item.settingReserveDd} , #{item.settingReserveBimonthly} , #{item.settingReserveWeekly} , #{item.settingReserveMultiday} ,TO_NUMBER(#{item.oneMonthSumAmount}) , #{item.settingBonusFlag}
,NULL
,TO_NUMBER(#{item.paymentBonus})
, #{item.reserveMmB1} , #{item.reserveDdB1} , #{item.reserveMmB2} , #{item.reserveDdB2} , #{item.planDate} , #{item.planDateBonus1} , #{item.planDateBonus2} , #{item.nextReserveDate} , #{item.kanyuKbn} , #{item.uketukeHouhou} , #{item.checkCompWrnAlert} , '2' , #{item.operatorId} , #{item.brokerCode} , #{item.intermediaryEmpCd} , '0' , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{item.createUser} , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{item.updateUser} )
